race.comment: Loads of winning hopes. DON TURBOAS (3) raced on the speed last start and battled on well but found one better over 1200m at this track. Long overdue and is sure to go close. UP TO TORI (10) closed off strongly last start to get up for second, beaten a long neck, over 1200m at this track when resuming after a break. Leading player again. VINRAAM (9) finished third, beaten 1.1 lengths, when resuming from a spell last start over 1200m at this track. Ran on well and can only be fitter. Looms as a significant threat. GOLD TIANNA (5) is better than last run and gets chance to atone.
